brand.voice: Clear, grounded, coach-led, practical, professional, calm but firm, human, direct, supportive with standards.

services.name: 6Fix
services.best_for: Beginners, returning clients, and inconsistent people who need a clear starting point.
services.outcome: Build the first layer of structure in training, practical nutrition, habits, and accountability.
services.support: Weekly check-ins, key video feedback, practical nutrition guidance, habit targets, in-app messaging, accountability.
services.next_step: Move into Restart-P, Restart-90, Restart-Base, or Restart-Perform depending on goal.
services.cta_line: Start with structure before chasing intensity.

services.name: Restart-P
services.best_for: People who can train independently but still need structure, coaching support, video feedback, nutrition guidance, and accountability.
services.outcome: Personalized programming with coaching feedback, not just a workout plan.
services.support: Onboarding call, weekly check-in, nutrition guidance, video feedback every session, in-app messaging, program adjustments.
services.next_step: Continue monthly, add video coaching, or upgrade into Restart-90.

services.name: Restart-90
services.best_for: Clients who need the full system: training, practical nutrition, habit coaching, accountability, group support, and progress review.
services.outcome: Transform training, nutrition, habits, and consistency in 90 days through a structured coaching system.
services.support: Weekly check-ins, video feedback, in-app messaging, group coaching calls, phase workshops, habits, nutrition, final review.
services.video_rule: Required based on assigned sessions and key movement checks.
services.next_step: Renew, transition to Restart-P, Restart-Base, or Restart-Perform.

services.name: Restart-Base
services.best_for: People who want to build strength, move better, improve capacity, and train for long-term health.
services.outcome: Stronger body, better movement, better long-term capacity.
services.support: Weekly check-ins, key movement video feedback, basic nutrition guidance, habit/accountability support, program adjustments.
services.video_rule: Key lifts and movement videos weekly.
services.next_step: Continue monthly, add video coaching, or move into Restart-90 if transformation support is needed.
services.cta_line: Build strength for the life you actually live.

services.name: Restart-Perform
services.best_for: Athletes and performance-focused clients who need structured training, required video feedback, and event-based support.
services.outcome: Train with structure, build performance, and get coached through every session.
services.support: Weekly check-ins, required video feedback every session, performance guidance, messaging, program adjustments, event prep planning.
services.next_step: Continue monthly, use event prep cycle, or add online video coaching.
services.cta_line: Performance training with structure and feedback.

add_ons.name: Online Video Coaching
add_ons.scope: Live training, movement assessment, technique correction, skill coaching, form review, workout supervision.

add_ons.name: Personal Coaching Consultation
add_ons.scope: 30-45 minute private guidance call for nutrition, habits, accountability, schedule planning, progress review. Not live training.

add_ons.name: Nutrition Add-On
add_ons.scope: Meal structure, food log review, portion targets, habit tracking, accountability, progress adjustments.

policies.core_rule: Program-only does not mean coach-less. Every Restart Fitness PH program includes structure, support, feedback, and accountability.
policies.response_time: Messages are answered within 24 hours on business days during coaching office hours.
policies.check_ins: Clients must submit one check-in per week. The assigned check-in day may vary by start date or program schedule.
policies.missed_checkins: 1 missed check-in: reminder. 2 missed: accountability message. 3 missed: review call or compliance warning. Ongoing missed check-ins: program continues but adjustments may be limited.
policies.refund: Payments are non-refundable once coaching has started, since program design, onboarding, and coaching resources are already allocated.
policies.pause: Online programs cannot be paused or frozen once the cycle starts.
policies.cancellation: Clients may cancel before the next billing cycle, but no cancellation is allowed inside an active paid program block.
policies.currency: Philippines pages use PHP primary with USD reference. International pages use USD primary with PHP reference.
